channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Baby Boomers are strangling the economy by refusing to move or retire
item.description: From housing to corporate leadership, America pays the price for a generation that never learned to let go.

item.title: Leading a $100 million turnaround: Why I learned to distrust the growth mindset
item.description: Silicon Valley's growth-first playbook is destroying an industry, and it took reversing $41 million in losses to see that.

item.title: Stocks ride earnings hot streak but investors face summer risks
Oil prices fall as U.S. signals nearing deal to reopen Hormuz with Iran
item.description: Brent crude dropped up to 5.2% to $98.12 a barrel; WTI traded near $92.
